docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-27-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-27-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF ERINNE JOHNSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KENNETH TONNA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S ORAL CHALLENGE TO THIS COURT'S JURISDICTION WAS HEARD AND DENIED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO DISCHARGE OEX. CASE SETTLED.

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ERINNE JOHNSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KENNETH TONNA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT AMICABLY SETTLED IN COURT. DEFENDANT PAID THE PLAINTIFF. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOTHING REPORTED. (D506)
